message:
fix(util,storage): DST-safe time parsing, id comment fix, and query cleanup

Time parsing:
- parse_flexible_timestamp() and parse_relative_time() now handle DST
  transitions gracefully: ambiguous times pick the earlier offset,
  nonexistent times (spring-forward gaps) shift forward by 1 hour
  instead of returning an error or None.

ID matching:
- Corrected comment in find_matching_ids: hash is extracted after the
  *last* dash, not the first.

Storage:
- Reformatted long migration condition in schema.rs for readability.
- Simplified remove_all_dependencies query to only select forward
  dependencies (issue_id WHERE depends_on_id = ?), removing the
  redundant UNION that double-counted reverse relationships.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
